name: Spaghetti Alla Carbonara
recipeIngredient: 8 slices bacon, cut crosswise into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook spaghetti as directed on package.
2. Meanwhile, fry bacon over moderate heat until crisp. Drain all but 1 tablespoon of fat.
3. Add the red pepper flakes and half-and-half to the skillet. Keep warm.
4. In a separate bowl, beat eggs with Parmesan cheese.
5. When pasta is tender but firm (al dente), drain well in a colander.
6. Transfer drained spaghetti to a warm serving bowl.
7. Mix in the softened butter.
8. Toss in the bacon mixture.
9. Add the egg mixture and toss again.
10. Sprinkle with parsley, black pepper to taste, and additional Parmesan cheese.
